title: LibertyParser fails on latch enable with parens, but no enclosing double quotes
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.58+89 (git sha1 75eff54b3, g++ 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

[hack.lib.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/23246073/hack.lib.txt)
read_liberty hack.lib

### Expected Behavior

Successful parsing of expression

### Actual Behavior

The offending statement is:

```
    latch (IQ,IQN) {
      data_in : "D";
      /*
        | double quotes | parens | Example | yosys result | ORFS result |
	| ------------- | ------ | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
	|      N        |   N    |   CLK   |    passes    |   passes    |
	|      N        |   Y    |  (CLK)  |    fails     |   passes    |
	|      Y        |   N    |  "CLK"  |    passes    |   passes    |
	|      Y        |   Y    | "(CLK)" |    passes    |   passes    |
      */
      enable : (CLK);
    }
```

which was effectively what I see in a proprietary Liberty file provided by an IP vendor.

```
% yosys

 /----------------------------------------------------------------------------\
 |  yosys -- Yosys Open SYnthesis Suite                                       |
 |  Copyright (C) 2012 - 2025  Claire Xenia Wolf <claire@yosyshq.com>         |
 |  Distributed under an ISC-like license, type "license" to see terms        |
 \----------------------------------------------------------------------------/
 Yosys 0.58+89 (git sha1 75eff54b3, g++ 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04 -fPIC -O3)

yosys> read_liberty hack.lib

1. Executing Liberty frontend: hack.lib
ERROR: Syntax error in liberty file on line 35.
```

The same file goes through openroad's liberty reader cleanly.
code_blocks:
% yosys

 /----------------------------------------------------------------------------\
 |  yosys -- Yosys Open SYnthesis Suite                                       |
 |  Copyright (C) 2012 - 2025  Claire Xenia Wolf <claire@yosyshq.com>         |
 |  Distributed under an ISC-like license, type "license" to see terms        |
 \----------------------------------------------------------------------------/
 Yosys 0.58+89 (git sha1 75eff54b3, g++ 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04 -fPIC -O3)

yosys> read_liberty hack.lib

1. Executing Liberty frontend: hack.lib
ERROR: Syntax error in liberty file on line 35.
